items.question: Do you offer free estimates?
items.answer: Yes, all estimates are free with no obligation. We'll come to your home, assess the work, and provide a detailed written quote.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Absolutely. We carry full liability insurance and hold NM contractor license NM-98765.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve the greater Albuquerque metro including Rio Rancho, Corrales, Bernalillo, and the East Mountains.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: It depends on scope. A bathroom remodel takes 2-3 weeks, a kitchen 4-6 weeks. We give you a timeline before we start.
